name: stockyard-promptpad
description: Prompt template versioning and A/B testing. Store, version, and test prompt templates. Track which variants perform best.

tools.name: promptpad_list
tools.description: List all prompt templates with version numbers and usage stats.

tools.name: promptpad_get
tools.description: Get a specific prompt template by name and optional version.

tools.name: promptpad_save
tools.description: Save or update a prompt template. Automatically versions.

tools.name: promptpad_render
tools.description: Render a template with variables and optionally send to LLM.

tools.name: promptpad_ab_stats
tools.description: Get A/B test results for prompt variants.

tools.name: promptpad_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the PromptPad proxy is running and healthy.
